creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Must be some issue with the diff. The file was renamed to make it an extra-patch

$ svn st www/nextcloud | grep -v \?
M       www/nextcloud/Makefile
M       www/nextcloud/distinfo
A  +    www/nextcloud/files/extra-patch-PostgreSQL-10
        > moved from www/nextcloud/files/patch-3rdparty_doctrine_dbal_lib_Doctrine_DBAL_Schema_PostgreSqlSchemaManager.php
D       www/nextcloud/files/patch-3rdparty_doctrine_dbal_lib_Doctrine_DBAL_Schema_PostgreSqlSchemaManager.php
        > moved to www/nextcloud/files/extra-patch-PostgreSQL-10
M       www/nextcloud/pkg-plist
